Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a luxury event managed within the app.

type.description: The category of the event (e.g., Wedding, Gala).

date.description: The scheduled date of the event.

status.description: The current stage of the event.

scannedCount.description: Number of guests who have checked in.

Guest.title: Guest
Guest.description: Represents a guest invited to a specific event.

isScanned.description: Whether the guest's QR code has been scanned.

scannedAt.description: The timestamp of when the guest was checked in.

/events/{eventId}/guests/{guestId}.description: Sub-collection of guests for a specific event.
